children.name:
Expect $(`~message-group`).$(`~time-ago`).$(`-ios class chain:**/XCUIElementTypeStaticText`) to have text

Expected: "ChatUserA"
Received: "ChatUserA - 6 seconds ago"
Chat User A - Validate Chat Message displays timestamp and user who sent it

Expect $(`~profile-content`).$(`-ios class chain:**/XCUIElementTypeStaticText[2]`) to have text

Expected: "STATUS"
Received: "STATUS MESSAGE"
Settings Profile - Assert screen and placeholder texts
